judgeScores.justification: Excellent organizational logic with consistent PascalCase naming and balanced 2-3 level nesting (e.g., Documents/Projects/ProjectAlpha). The MANIFEST.md is comprehensive, documenting 80 files across 18 folders with clear tree visualization. Minor weakness: Documents/Personal mixes work-related files (roadmaps, OKRs) with personal items, slightly muddling the category semantics.
